title: Inlet Move Co. pricing config
description: Single source of truth for pricing, phone, claims, and trust flags. Read at Astro build time. Future MoverOS CRM webhook posts validated payloads against this schema before committing.

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last edit. Updated by hand today, by CRM webhook tomorrow.

source.description: Where this payload originated. 'manual' = hand-edited; 'moveros-crm' = CRM webhook commit.

currency.description: Single-currency for v1. Add 'USD' here only when we expand pricing display.

hourlyRate.description: CAD per hour for two movers + cargo van.

minimumCharge.description: Minimum job charge in CAD. Should equal hourlyRate * minimumHours.

tel.description: E.164 dialable form for tel: hrefs, e.g. '+18336683393'.

active.description: False = number not yet provisioned; build is gated on this being true.

responseTimeMinutes.description: Target response time in minutes. Always rendered with 'Target' prefix until verified by 30+ days of measured ops data.

onTimePercent.description: Target on-time arrival rate. Same hedging rule as responseTimeMinutes.

overagePercent.description: Target overage from quote to bill. Same hedging rule.

insuranceAmountCAD.description: Coverage amount in CAD. Used only when trust.insuranceBound = true.

insuranceLabel.description: Verified short-form label, e.g. '$2M cargo + liability'. Body copy renders this when trust.insuranceBound = true; renders the hedged form ('Insurance application in progress') when false.

emailResponseHours.description: Target email response window in hours during inquiry hours. Renders as '${n} hour(s)' in /contact + /faq.

damageResponseLabel.description: Phrase used in damage-claim response copy (FAQ Q7). e.g. 'as soon as we can' (no fixed window) or 'within two business days' (fixed commitment). Drives the FAQ answer prose.

bcRegistered.description: BC business registration verified. Required true to render 'BC-registered' as fact.

workSafeBCActive.description: WorkSafeBC clearance currently active. False = render 'WorkSafeBC application in progress'.

insuranceBound.description: Cargo + liability policy bound and active. False = render 'Insurance application in progress · $2M target coverage'.

quote.description: Public origin of the quote app. v1: https://quote.inletmove.com (Vercel Next.js). All 'Get a quote' CTAs and the JSON-LD ReserveAction read this. Flip the value here to repoint every CTA in one config edit.

address.description: BC-Registry-of-record office address. Emitted as schema.org PostalAddress on the global MovingCompany graph entity, and inlined into /privacy's 'Privacy contact' section.

retention.description: Data retention defaults. Drives /privacy's 'How long we keep it' section. Operational records use operationalMonths; photos use photosNote (insurance-claim window); financial records use financialNote (CRA, six years inlined as regulatory fact).

operationalMonths.description: Default retention for quote requests, move records, SMS logs. 24 = two years (industry standard, matches insurance claim window).

photosNote.description: Phrase rendered in privacy policy for move-day-photo retention. Decoupled from a fixed number because photo retention is tied to insurance policy terms.

financialNote.description: Phrase rendered for financial records. Default 'per CRA requirements' — the literal six-year duration is inlined in the policy because it's a regulatory fact, not config.

hours.description: Two-tier hours model. inquiries = customer-facing contact channel (24/7 with Maya AI when live; 08:00-20:00 conservative when not). moves = human dispatch hours (fixed 08:00-20:00). Flipping inquiryAgent to null automatically reverts inquiry hours copy to conservative form on next build.

inquiries.description: Display label for inquiry hours. '24/7' when AI agent live; otherwise mirror movesOpens-movesCloses.

inquiryAgent.description: Name of the AI inquiry agent. 'Maya' when live; null when not. null triggers conservative-hours fallback in /contact + /faq + Org.contactPoint schema.

movesDays.description: Days of the week move dispatch operates. Currently all 7.

tiers.description: Service tier definitions. Each entry's slug is the URL slug for /[slug]-movers (e.g. '2-bedroom' → /2-bedroom-movers). estimatedHours is [low, high] used at build time to render 'X-Y hour, $low-$high typical' price math.

terms.description: Site-wide T&C disclaimers. Rendered by the shared <Terms /> component at home, /services, every tier page, /contact, and the footer (every page). 'compact' is the consolidated form for small-print contexts; 'areaEligibility' and 'scopeDecline' are the split forms.

areaEligibility.description: Service-area eligibility clause. Includes 'call to confirm' phrasing.

scopeDecline.description: Right-to-decline clause for jobs exceeding standard scope.

compact.description: Consolidated form combining areaEligibility + scopeDecline. Used in single-line small-print contexts (footer, hero CTA underline).

estimatedHours.description: [low, high] estimate in hours. Multiplied by rates.hourlyRate at build time.
